designer.title: NexUI Designer
validation.missingContractElement: A required contract element is missing.
validation.missingGlyph: The font is missing a required glyph.
tooltip.variants: Create and edit variants that open the same screen differently per situation (Compact, Controller, Combat, ...).
tooltip.responsive: Edit responsive rules that adapt layout automatically by resolution and input mode.
tooltip.contract: Define and check the elements and capabilities a screen must provide.
tooltip.snapshot: Capture the current UI state as a snapshot and compare it later to detect regressions.
tooltip.diff: Show element/binding/motion/theme/policy differences before vs after in a readable form.
tooltip.refactor: Safely rename identifiers (elementId, screenId, stateKey, ...) including all references.
tooltip.cleaner: Find dead references (broken bindings, keys, targets) and remove or replace them.
tooltip.flowSimulator: Simulate interaction flow from button click through command execution and screen transitions.
tooltip.inputPreview: Preview UI differences per input mode: Keyboard/Mouse, Gamepad, Touch, SteamDeck.
tooltip.promptGlyph: Manage per-device button prompt glyphs and check for missing ones.
tooltip.gameLocalization: Edit the ko-KR/en-US game UI text table and check for missing translations / overflow.
tooltip.fontChecker: Check whether the current font can render Korean / special glyphs and whether TMP fallback is set.
tooltip.profiler: Measure opened screen/element/binding/motion counts and open/close/theme-apply timings.
tooltip.bindingProfiler: Track binding update frequency and cost, warning on excessively updated keys.
tooltip.motionBudget: Limit concurrent motions and manage budget overruns and priorities.
tooltip.contrastChecker: Compute WCAG contrast for theme color pairs and warn on low-readability combinations.
tooltip.loadingStrategy: Set each screen's load strategy (Preload, LazyLoad, Addressable, Pool, KeepAlive).
tooltip.recipes: Generate common UI structures (Pause, Settings, Inventory, ...) from templates in one step.
tooltip.agentHandoff: Export the current project state as JSON/Markdown for an AI CLI agent to understand.
tooltip.accessibility: Preview accessibility preferences (reduce motion, high contrast, large text) and their effects.
tooltip.captureSnapshot: Capture the current screen's element state as a snapshot.
tooltip.compare: Compute and show the difference between the two selected targets.
tooltip.rename: Rename all references together to the entered name.
tooltip.findDeadReferences: Search the whole project for broken references.
tooltip.clean: Remove or replace the detected broken references.
tooltip.simulate: Run the interaction flow of the selected element and show the result.
tooltip.exportManifest: Export the AI handoff Manifest (JSON) and Brief (Markdown) to files.
tooltip.copyCliPrompt: Copy a prompt for the CLI agent to the clipboard.
